activities_projects.title: Theme Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the central theme of the story
steps: Identify the main theme of the story
Write 6–8 sentences explaining how the theme is developed

activities_projects.title: Satire in the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand satire used in the story
steps: Identify examples of foolish decisions in the kingdom
Explain how they create satire

activities_projects.title: Justice System Evaluation
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the justice system of the kingdom
steps: Describe how the court handled the thief’s death case
Explain why the system failed

activities_projects.title: Symbolism of the Stake
steps: Explain the significance of the execution stake
Write how it changed the fate of the king and minister

activities_projects.title: Guru’s Strategy
steps: Describe the plan made by the guru
Explain why it successfully fooled the king
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses strategic thinking in the story

activities_projects.title: Character Development
activities_projects.objective: Analyse character development in the story
steps: Explain how the disciple changes during the story
Give examples from the text

activities_projects.title: Moral Interpretation
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the moral of the folktale
steps: Write the moral of the story
Explain how the events of the story support it

activities_projects.title: Folktale Elements
steps: List typical folktale features present in the story
Explain them with examples

activities_projects.title: Alternate Ending
steps: Imagine a different ending to the story
Write 6–8 sentences describing it

activities_projects.title: Relevance to Modern Society
activities_projects.objective: Relate the story to real life
steps: Explain how foolish leadership can affect society
Relate the lesson to modern situations
